questions.template: What force is required to accelerate a {m} kg object at {a} m/s²?
An object weighs {w} N on Earth. What is its mass? (Use g = 9.8 m/s²)
A {m} kg object slides on a surface with coefficient of friction {mu}. What is the friction force? (Use g = 9.8 m/s²)
A {f1} N force pushes east and a {f2} N force pushes west on a {m} kg object. What is the magnitude of acceleration?
